code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Initializing: start_link(Options)

    state Initializing {
        [*] --> LoadConfig
        LoadConfig --> InitTransport
        InitTransport --> EstablishConnection
        EstablishConnection --> SendInitialize
        SendInitialize --> WaitForInitialized
        WaitForInitialized --> [*]
    }

    Initializing --> Connected: initialized received

    state Connected {
        [*] --> Active

        Active --> ResourceOperations: list/read/subscribe
        Active --> ToolOperations: call_tool
        Active --> PromptOperations: list/get

        ResourceOperations --> Active
        ToolOperations --> Active
        PromptOperations --> Active

        Active --> Subscribing: subscribe_resource
        Subscribing --> Active: subscription_confirmed
    }

    Connected --> Paused: pause_requested
    Paused --> Connected: resume_requested

    Connected --> Reconnecting: transport_error
    Reconnecting --> Connected: reconnect_success
    Reconnecting --> Failed: reconnect_failed(max_retries)

    Connected --> GracefulShutdown: shutdown notification
    GracefulShutdown --> [*]: cleanup_complete

    Connected --> AbnormalShutdown: critical_error
    AbnormalShutdown --> [*]: cleanup_complete

    %% Session Backend Transitions
    note right of Connected
        Session Persistence:
        - ETS: In-memory
        - DETS: Disk-based
        - Mnesia: Cluster
    end note

    %% Reconnection Strategy
    state Reconnecting {
        [*] --> Backoff
        Backoff --> ReconnectAttempt
        ReconnectAttempt --> Success
        ReconnectAttempt --> Failure

        Success --> [*]
        Failure --> IncrementRetryCount
        IncrementRetryCount --> CheckMaxRetries

        CheckMaxRetries --> Backoff: below_max
        CheckMaxRetries --> [*]: exceeded_max
    }

    %% State Transition Details
    Connected --> SessionValidation: periodic_health_check
    SessionValidation --> Connected: healthy
    SessionValidation --> Failed: unhealthy(timeout)

    %% Session Restoration (Failover)
    note right of Reconnecting
        Failover Modes:
        - Local: Restart process
        - Remote: Mnesia replica
        - Recovery: Load from DETS
    end note

    %% Subscription Management
    state Subscribing {
        [*] --> RegisterSubscription
        RegisterSubscription --> SetupWatcher
        SetupWatcher --> ConfirmSubscription
        ConfirmSubscription --> [*]
    }

    %% Cleanup on Shutdown
    state GracefulShutdown {
        [*] --> UnsubscribeResources
        UnsubscribeResources --> DrainPendingRequests
        DrainPendingRequests --> CloseTransport
        CloseTransport --> PersistSession
        PersistSession --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [*]
    }

    %% Error States
    state AbnormalShutdown {
        [*] --> LogError
        LogError --> PersistCrashDump
        PersistCrashDump --> NotifyDependents
        NotifyDependents --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [*]
    }

    %% Session State Fields
    note right of Connected
        Session State:
        - session_id: UUID
        - transport_pid: PID
        - pending_requests: map(UUID -> Request)
        - subscriptions: map(URI -> Subscription)
        - capabilities: #capabilities{}
        - last_activity: timestamp()
        - backend: ets | dets | mnesia
    end note

    %% Activity Monitoring
    Connected --> IdleTimeout: no_activity(timeout)
    IdleTimeout --> [*]: session_expired

    %% Rate Limiting
    Connected --> RateLimited: request_rate_exceeded
    RateLimited --> Connected: backoff_complete
    RateLimited --> Failed: rate_limit_persistent

    %% Resource Watcher Lifecycle
    state ResourceOperations {
        [*] --> Watching
        Watching --> NotificationReceived: resource_changed
        NotificationReceived --> DeliverNotification
        DeliverNotification --> Watching
    }

    %% Tool Execution Lifecycle
    state ToolOperations {
        [*] --> Executing
        Executing --> InProgress: long_running_op
        InProgress --> ProgressUpdate: send_progress
        ProgressUpdate --> InProgress
        InProgress --> Complete: finished
        Complete --> [*]
    }

    %% Session Backend Selection
    note left of Initializing
        Backend Selection:
        {backend, erlmcp_session_ets}
        - Fastest: O(1) access
        - Volatile: Lost on crash

        {backend, erlmcp_session_dets}
        - Durable: Disk persistence
        - Slower: I/O overhead

        {backend, erlmcp_session_mnesia}
        - Distributed: Cluster sync
        - CAP: Consistency trade-offs
    end note

    %% Health Check States
    Connected --> HealthCheck: periodic_timer
    HealthCheck --> Connected: all_systems_go
    HealthCheck --> Degraded: subsystem_failure
    Degraded --> Connected: recovery_complete
    Degraded --> Failed: recovery_failed

    %% Session Restoration Flow
    note right of Reconnecting
        Restoration Priority:
        1. Restore subscriptions
        2. Replay pending requests
        3. Restore capabilities
        4. Resume monitoring
    end note
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为MCP会话管理器设计一个完整的状态机。核心场景是从启动到正常运行的生命周期，还要处理网络抖动和优雅关闭。
明白了。启动阶段需要包含哪些关键步骤？是直接跳到连接状态，还是要有配置加载和传输层初始化的中间状态？
启动要分阶段：先LoadConfig加载配置，然后InitTransport初始化传输层，接着EstablishConnection建立连接，最后SendInitialize发送初始化消息等对方确认。这些都应该封装在Initializing复合状态里。
好的，Initializing内部有五个顺序状态，收到initialized消息后进入Connected。Connected作为主运行态，内部应该支持哪些操作？
Connected内部核心是Active状态，从Active可以分叉到三类操作：ResourceOperations处理资源的list/read/subscribe，ToolOperations执行call_tool，PromptOperations管理prompt的list/get。做完都要回到Active。
资源订阅是个异步过程，需要单独状态吗？还是直接在ResourceOperations里处理？
订阅需要独立状态。从Active触发subscribe_resource进入Subscribing，内部要有RegisterSubscription注册、SetupWatcher设置监听、ConfirmSubscription确认，完成后回到Active。
已添加Subscribing复合状态。现在处理暂停和恢复需求？
对，Connected可以收到pause_requested进入Paused，resume_requested后回到Connected。这是运维手动介入的场景。
网络异常处理我设想这样：transport_error触发Reconnecting，成功则回Connected，失败且超max_retries则进入Failed。Reconnecting内部需要backoff和重试计数逻辑。
Reconnecting内部结构再细化一下？重试策略要可配置。
Reconnecting内部：入口到Backoff，然后ReconnectAttempt，成功走Success出口，失败走Failure到IncrementRetryCount，再到CheckMaxRetries判断，below_max回Backoff继续，exceeded_max则退出到Failed。
可以。另外需要两种关闭路径：GracefulShutdown是收到shutdown通知后的优雅关闭，AbnormalShutdown是critical_error触发的紧急关闭。
GracefulShutdown内部流程：UnsubscribeResources取消订阅，DrainPendingRequests排空待处理请求，CloseTransport关闭传输，PersistSession持久化会话，最后TerminateProcess。
AbnormalShutdown不同：先LogError记录，PersistCrashDump保存崩溃现场，NotifyDependents通知依赖方，然后TerminateProcess。
会话存储后端怎么设计？需要支持不同场景。
三种后端：ETS纯内存最快但易失，DETS磁盘持久化有I/O开销，Mnesia支持集群但有CAP权衡。用note标注在Connected右侧。
已添加会话持久化说明。Initializing左侧也加了个note说明后端选择策略和各自的O(1)访问、易失性等特性。
还需要健康检查机制。Connected触发periodic_health_check进入SessionValidation，healthy回Connected，unhealthy且timeout则进Failed。
SessionValidation和HealthCheck是同一个东西吗？我看到后面还有个HealthCheck状态。
不对，我搞混了。periodic_health_check应该触发HealthCheck状态，不是SessionValidation。HealthCheck检查all_systems_go回Connected，subsystem_failure则进入Degraded降级状态。
修正了，HealthCheck替代SessionValidation。Degraded之后呢？
Degraded可以recovery_complete回到Connected，或者recovery_failed进入Failed。
空闲超时也需要处理吧？长时间无活动应该清理资源。
对，Connected检测到no_activity且timeout进入IdleTimeout，直接session_expired结束。
限流场景：request_rate_exceeded进入RateLimited，backoff_complete回Connected，如果rate_limit_persistent则进Failed。
合理。现在细化ResourceOperations内部：Watching状态等待resource_changed，触发NotificationReceived，然后DeliverNotification，回到Watching。
ToolOperations也要细化：Executing开始，long_running_op进入InProgress，可以send_progress到ProgressUpdate再回InProgress，finished到Complete结束。
Reconnecting右侧需要加个note说明Failover模式：Local重启进程、Remote用Mnesia副本、Recovery从DETS加载。
已添加Failover说明。会话状态字段也需要文档化吧？
在Connected右侧加note：session_id是UUID，transport_pid是PID，pending_requests是UUID到Request的映射，subscriptions是URI到Subscription的映射，capabilities是记录，last_activity是时间戳，backend标记存储类型。
已添加。Restoration Priority的note放在Reconnecting右侧？
对，优先级：先恢复subscriptions，再replay pending requests，然后restore capabilities，最后resume monitoring。
GracefulShutdown和AbnormalShutdown最后都是TerminateProcess到[*]，这个设计确认吗？
确认，两种关闭最终都清理完毕进入终止。但AbnormalShutdown多了一步PersistCrashDump，方便事后分析。
检查下整体结构：Initializing复合状态有正确入口和出口，Connected内部Active分叉清晰，所有异常路径都有归宿，三个主要note位置合理。
WaitForInitialized到[*]的转换是正常完成Initializing吗？然后才触发initialized received到Connected？
是的，Initializing内部完成后，外部转换initialized received进入Connected。语义是内部子状态机完成，外部事件触发状态迁移。
最后确认Activity Monitoring：Connected检测到no_activity且timeout进入IdleTimeout，session_expired直接结束，没有恢复路径。
全部确认。状态机涵盖：启动初始化、正常运行、资源/工具/提示操作、订阅管理、暂停恢复、重连退避、健康检查、优雅/异常关闭、空闲超时、限流控制、后端选择策略。
完整了。这个状态机能覆盖MCP会话从start_link到各种异常场景的全生命周期，各复合状态的内部分解也足够指导代码实现。
